new_epic.title: User Management
new_epic.approach_summary: PostgreSQL database with users and user_roles tables
success_criteria: Users table stores account credentials and profile data
Database migrations are idempotent and reversible

open_epics.title: Order Processing
open_epics.approach_summary: PostgreSQL database with orders, order_items, and payments tables
success_criteria: Orders table tracks order status and customer reference
Order_items table stores line items with quantity and price
Payments table records payment method and transaction IDs
